prompt: Tap cutoff seat before in-position depth action.
why_v1: Seat anchor keeps action order stable before depth decisions.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Cutoff is the seat anchor because that earlier late-position range is what the in-position depth plan is measured against.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The cutoff is the right anchor here because the earlier late-position seat defines which in-position range is actually being measured.
